result.finding: Application is licensed under Apache License, Version 2.0 as declared in pom.xml. No separate LICENSE file exists in the repository. Key dependencies (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud Azure, Hibernate) are also Apache 2.0. MySQL Connector/J uses GPL with FOSS exception.
evidence: No standalone LICENSE file found in repository root
Spring Boot (Apache 2.0), Spring Cloud Azure (MIT/Apache 2.0), Hibernate (LGPL 2.1/Apache 2.0)
MySQL Connector/J: GPL v2 with FOSS exception (compatible with open source applications)
H2 Database: EPL 1.0 / MPL 2.0 (test scope only)
values: MySQL Connector/J: GPL v2 with FOSS exception
No proprietary or commercial licenses detected
